name: Trendline Puppy Food Lamb And Rice 15kg
shortDescription: Fully balanced all-natural puppy food with lamb protein, brewer’s yeast for immune support and Omega-3 and -6 from flaxseed. Carefully formulated by dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all puppies.
description: Trendline Puppy Food – Lamb & Rice , fully balanced all-natural puppy food with lamb protein, brewer’s yeast for immune support and Omega-3 and -6 from flaxseed. Carefully formulated by dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all puppies. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein …………………………………..24% Fat ………………………………………….9% Crude Ash ……………………………… 8% Crude Cellulose (Fiber) …………… 4% INGREDIENTS: Processed Animal Protein, Corn, Animal Fat, Wheat Middlings, Corn Gluten, Dried Sugar Beet, Liver Aroma, Salt, Flaxseed, Dried Brewer’s Yeast. MINERALS: Calcium, Phosphorus, Sodium, Iodine, Zinc, Copper, Potassium Chloride, Iron, Selenium. VITAMINS: Vit. A, Vit. D, Vit. E, Vit. C, Vit. B1 – B2 – B3 (niacin) – B6 – B12 – B7 (biotin) – B9 (folic acid), Vit. K, Choline, Calcium Pantotetan. Key Benefits for Your Puppy 18% Lamb Protein – supports muscle growth and provides sustained energy for active pups. 9% Healthy Fats – promotes brain development, healthy skin, and a glossy coat. Brewer’s Yeast – boosts immunity and aids in healthy digestion. Omega-3 & -6 Fatty Acids – support cognitive function and joint health. Rice for Gentle Digestion – ideal for young tummies adjusting to solid food. Why Puppy Parents Love It: . Gentle on sensitive stomachs. . Promotes strong immunity and healthy growth. . Delicious lamb flavor puppies can’t resist.
